items.reasoning: Lane sustain against PA Stifling Dagger harass and Sven Storm Hammer trades.
Ward carry lane pull camp; deny PA free farm with vision on pull timing.
Emergency heal on carry when PA crits for 200+ at level 3.
2x branches for +2 stats; builds into Wand. Every HP point matters.
Positioning for Shadow Wave heal bounces. Stay within 450 range of carry.
PA Dagger + Sven Storm Hammer spam generate wand charges consistently.
-5 armor on PA amplifies your carry's right-click damage. PA has low base armor.
+6 armor + 10% evasion on your carry. PA and Sven deal physical only -- Crest reduces all of it.
Ethereal form dodges PA crit + Sven cleave. Both deal purely physical damage -- 0 damage taken.
Invisible heal on carry during PA + Sven focus. Buys 5s for Shallow Grave CD.
Survives PA crit initiation. 2.5s invulnerability ensures Shallow Grave cast on carry.
Dazzle Shard upgrade for extended team utility and healing.
Push carry out of Sven God's Strength range. Reposition after PA blink strike.
If ahead, Greaves dispel + heal aura sustains team through extended physical siege.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Dazzle's Shallow Grave is the ultimate answer to physical burst. Ghost Scepter makes Dazzle untargetable by both PA and Sven. Solar Crest on carry reduces incoming physical by 30%+. Keep Shallow Grave for PA crits and prioritize positioning to always be in range of your carry.
